comment_ja: 対象に飛びつく衝動が、検索・反証・構築を経て検証へ組み替わっていく流れを示す図。
comment_en: A diagram showing how the impulse to seize an object is reworked into verification through search, counterargument, and construction.
alt_ja: ゴリラとバナナ、投稿アイコン、検索バー、AI などの語を矢印でつないだ多層図
alt_en: A layered diagram linking a gorilla, a banana, a post icon, a search bar, and AI-related terms with arrows
